name: San Francisco Cioppino
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Firm white fish fillets; cut into 1-inch chunks
1/2 lb Medium-size shrimp; peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onion and green bell pepper; cook until softened.
3. Stir in minced garlic; sauté for an additional minute.
4. Stir in tomatoes, white wine, clam juice, crushed dried Italian herbs, and bay leaf.
5. Cover and simmer on low heat for 20 minutes.
6. Add fish chunks, shrimp, and scallops to the saucepan.
7. Cook until fish and scallops are opaque and shrimp turn pink (about 2 minutes).
8. Add crab, if using; cook an additional 1-2 minutes or until heated through.
9. Stir in lite soy sauce and chopped parsley.
10. Serve immediately.
